---
title: "L: Antineoplastic and immunomodulating agents"
date: "2026-02-08"
---

| Level 2 code | Description |
| ---: | :--- |
| L01 | Antineoplastic agents |
| L02 | Endocrine therapy |
| L03 | Immunostimulants |
| L04 | Immunosuppressants |

: ATC L level 2 codes {#tbl-atc-l-lvl-2 tbl-colwidths="[20, 80]"}

# Immunotherapy

![](https://pub.mdpi-res.com/pharmaceutics/pharmaceutics-14-01630/article_deploy/html/images/pharmaceutics-14-01630-g001.png?1659607210)

# CAR-T cell therapy

Chimeric Antigen Receptor (CAR T) cell therapy

Emily was the first patient with incurable leukemia, cured using CAR T therapy. Grupp et al., N Engl J Med 2013. <https://www.nejm.org/doi/full/10.1056/nejmoa1215134>

## CD19 CAR T cells
